creator: anthony.maher@uts.edu.au
text:
New port MUMmer (http://mummer.sourceforge.net/)
	"MUMmer is a system for rapidly aligning entire genomes, whether in
	complete or draft form."
	I want it as a prerequisite for:
	AMOS Assembler. A Modular Open Source Assembler.
	(http://amos.sourceforge.net)
	Will send a port for this soon.
